_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to Conduct flow data analysis
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-007 (DA, cosine: 0.513), SP-S-002 (SP, cosine: 0.507).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.614). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [ability, analysis, conduct, flow] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, designing, identifying, improvement, inefficiencies] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.904, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to Conduct flow data analysis" and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 < STS 0.614 (gap -0.083). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [ability, analysis, conduct] and [automation, conducting, designing] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [ability, analysis, conduct, flow]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, designing, identifying, improvement, inefficiencies].
